day1_after_start.name: Me
day1_after_start.text: *The bell rings. Sunset light fills the classroom. Not bad for a first day.*

day1_after_start_2.name: Me
day1_after_start_2.text: *Head straight home, or look around a bit more?*

day1_after_choice.name: Me
choices: Sea invited me to hang out at the student council room
Go see Yuna at the library again
I keep thinking about Ms. Riin at the nurse's office
Stop by the faculty office to say hi to Ms. Eunsu

day1_after_sea.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea.text: "You came! This is the student council room. I'm the only one here, so make yourself at home."

day1_after_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_2.text: "{name}, how was your first day? Think you can settle in okay?"

day1_after_sea_3.name: Me
day1_after_sea_3.text: "It wasn't bad. Thanks to you, it went pretty smooth."

day1_after_sea_4.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_4.text: "Good to hear. If there's anything you don't know, just ask me anytime. I'm happy to help."

day1_after_sea_5.name: Me
day1_after_sea_5.text: *Sea pulls out her student council notebook, and I notice a small doodle in the corner of the page. A cat drawing.*

day1_after_sea_7.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_7.text: "...! I wish you hadn't seen that. When meetings drag on I get bored..."

day1_after_sea_8.name: Me
day1_after_sea_8.text: *Sunset light streams in through the window. The student council room is bathed in orange.*

day1_after_sea_9.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_9.text: "...I like this time. Almost no one left at school, and it's so quiet."

day1_after_sea_10.name: Me
day1_after_sea_10.text: *Sea smiles, looking out the window. Not the face of a class president — just a girl the same age as me.*

day1_after_sea_11.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_11.text: "Don't worry, {name}. Whatever happens at this school, I'll take care of everything."

day1_after_sea_12.name: Me
day1_after_sea_12.text: *...That's reassuring. With a class president like her, everything should be fine.*

day1_after_yuna.name: Me
day1_after_yuna.text: *I head to the library and Yuna's already there, sorting through her photos.*

day1_after_yuna_2.name: Choi Yuna
day1_after_yuna_2.text: "You're back! This place is kind of my hideout. Want to see some of the photos I took?"

day1_after_yuna_3.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_3.text: *I flip through Yuna's photos. School scenery, cats, sunsets... She's actually pretty good.*

day1_after_yuna_4.name: Me
day1_after_yuna_4.text: *The last photo is a closed door at the end of a dark hallway. I'm about to ask "What's this?" but she quickly swipes past it.*

day1_after_riin.name: School Nurse
day1_after_riin.text: "Back again? Is the medicine working okay?"

day1_after_riin_2.name: School Nurse
day1_after_riin_2.text: "If you're bored after school, come by anytime. I can at least offer you some tea."

day1_after_riin_3.name: Me
day1_after_riin_3.text: *I had tea and chatted with Ms. Riin. It was a nice, relaxing time.*

day1_after_eunsu.name: Homeroom Teacher
day1_after_eunsu.text: "{name}! You came all the way to the faculty office after school? That's sweet of you."

day1_after_eunsu_2.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_2.text: *Ms. Eunsu made me coffee and asked me all sorts of things about how school was going.*

day1_after_eunsu_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day1_after_eunsu_3.text: "How was your old school? I hope you're not having too much trouble adjusting here."

day1_after_eunsu_4.name: Homeroom Teacher
day1_after_eunsu_4.text: "You don't have to worry about a thing at this school. I'll make sure to protect {name}."

day1_after_eunsu_5.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_5.text: *She's a warm teacher. I'm glad to have someone like her as my homeroom teacher.*

day1_after_home.name: Me
day1_after_home.text: *I look back as I walk out the school gate. It's a good school.*

day1_after_home_2.name: Me
day1_after_home_2.text: *The sunset is beautiful. Tomorrow should be nice too.*

day1_after_end.name: Me
day1_after_end.text: *I head home. Looking forward to tomorrow.*
